title: CAST in WHERE clause causes inconsistent query results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE CAST(age AS VARCHAR) = '30';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CAST function used in WHERE clause
